content:
Based on my search, here are the top 5 GitHub repositories with the most stars as of today:
1. TensorFlow (https://github.com/tensorflow/tensorflow)
2. React (https://github.com/facebook/react)
3. Node.js (https://github.com/nodejs/node)
4. Vue.js (https://github.com/vuejs/vue)
5. Kubernetes (https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes)
